description:
Fatima Al-Hassan (DOB: August 9, 1978) presents for her annual diabetes review. Log in to OSCAR EMR (oscardoc / oscar / PIN: 1117) and complete the following clinical workflow in her chart:

1. Record vitals: Blood Pressure 142/88 mmHg, Heart Rate 78 bpm, Weight 81.2 kg, Height 163 cm.
2. Record diabetic measurements: HbA1c 8.1%, Fasting Blood Glucose 9.2 mmol/L.
3. Discontinue her current Glyburide 5mg prescription (reason: recurrent hypoglycemic episodes).
4. Prescribe Sitagliptin 100mg, one tablet by mouth once daily. Quantity: 90 tablets, 3 repeats.
5. Add allergy: Sulfonamides, reaction "Skin rash and hives", severity Moderate.
6. Write encounter note: "Annual diabetic review. HbA1c elevated at 8.1%. Discontinuing Glyburide due to recurrent hypoglycemia, replacing with Sitagliptin 100mg daily. New sulfonamide allergy documented. Counseled on diet and exercise. Follow-up in 3 months."
7. Create a tickler assigned to yourself for this patient, due 90 days from today, message: "Diabetes follow-up — repeat HbA1c and fasting glucose, assess Sitagliptin efficacy."
